mapper.select: select distinct m.perm_key from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on u.id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on ur.role_id = r.id left join sys_role_menu rm on r.id = rm.role_id left join sys_menu m on rm.menu_id = m.id where u.id = #{id}
select distinct r.role_key from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on u.id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on ur.role_id = r.id where u.id = #{id}
select u.* from sys_role r left join sys_user_role ur on r.id = ur.role_id left join sys_user u on ur.user_id = u.id where r.id = 3
